name: Lavash
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with salt and sugar into a large mixing bowl.
2. Cut in shortening.
3. Combine egg and milk.
4. Stir the egg and milk mixture into the flour mixture, mixing well until a firm dough forms.
5. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
7. Sprinkle sesame seeds on 4 baking sheets.
8. Knead the dough for 2-3 minutes.
9. Divide the dough into fourths and roll each piece until it is about 1/16 inch thick.
10. Place the rolled dough on the prepared pans.
11. Brush the dough with water and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
12. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until browned and crisp.
13. Break into pieces and serve with butter.
Makes 4 sheets. Enjoy!
